'''haduthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabbalist|cabbalist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-d-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabbalist|cabbalist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| haduthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hædithith|hædithith]] || [[word:hædithij|hædithij]] || [[word:hædithish|hædithish]] || [[word:hædithi|hædithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:haduduthuth|haduduthuth]] || [[word:haduduthuj|haduduthuj]] || [[word:haduduthush|haduduthush]] || [[word:haduduthu|haduduthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:haduthuth|haduthuth]] || [[word:haduthuj|haduthuj]] || [[word:haduthush|haduthush]] || [[word:haduthu|haduthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadufthuth|hadufthuth]] || [[word:hadufthuj|hadufthuj]] || [[word:hadufthush|hadufthush]] || [[word:hadufthuf|hadufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:haduthuthu|haduthuthu]] || [[word:haduthuju|haduthuju]] || [[word:haduthushu|haduthushu]] || [[word:haduthuku|haduthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:haduthuth|haduthuth]] || [[word:haduthuj|haduthuj]] || [[word:haduthush|haduthush]] || [[word:haduthu|haduthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:haduthuthul|haduthuthul]] || [[word:haduthujul|haduthujul]] || [[word:haduthushul|haduthushul]] || [[word:haduthukul|haduthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:haduthuthuthu|haduthuthuthu]] || [[word:haduthujuju|haduthujuju]] || [[word:haduthushushu|haduthushushu]] || [[word:haduthuku|haduthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:haduthuthun|haduthuthun]] || [[word:haduthujun|haduthujun]] || [[word:haduthushun|haduthushun]] || [[word:haduthukun|haduthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:haduthuthuoro|haduthuthuoro]] || [[word:haduthujuoro|haduthujuoro]] || [[word:haduthushuoro|haduthushuoro]] || [[word:haduthukuoro|haduthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
